footer.description: An open-source, browser-based torrent platform. Stream, download, and manage torrents without installing anything.
home.title: Online Torrent Platform — Stream & Download in Browser
home.description: Web-based torrent platform to stream and download your own torrents directly in the browser. No software required. Secure cloud processing and storage
home.ogTitle: Webtor.io — Stream & Download Torrents in Browser
home.ogDescription: Web-based torrent platform to stream and download your own torrents directly in the browser. No software required.
home.jsonLdDescription: Stream and download torrents directly in your browser. No software required.
home.heading: Stream & download
home.subtitle: Paste a magnet link or upload a .torrent file and start watching or downloading instantly. No torrent client required.
about.how.title: Three steps. That's it.
about.how.subtitle: Go from magnet link to streaming video or direct download in under a minute.
about.how.step1.title: Paste or upload
about.how.step1.text: Enter a magnet link, infohash, or drag-and-drop a .torrent file into the browser.
about.how.step2.title: Pick your file
about.how.step2.text: Browse the torrent contents and select the file you want to stream or download.
about.how.step3.title: Stream or download
about.how.step3.text: Watch video instantly in the built-in player, or grab a direct HTTP download link.
about.features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
about.features.subtitle: A complete torrent toolkit that runs entirely in the cloud and your browser.
about.features.ddl.title: Direct Download Links
about.features.ddl.text: Get a regular HTTP download link for any file inside the torrent. No VPN or client needed.
about.features.streaming.title: Instant Streaming
about.features.streaming.text: Watch video and listen to audio directly in the browser without waiting for the full download.
about.features.stremio.title: Stremio Integration
about.features.stremio.text: Watch your library on any smart TV or device running Stremio via the addon link.
about.features.zip.title: ZIP Archive Download
about.features.zip.text: Download the entire torrent as a ZIP archive on-the-fly, preserving the original folder structure.
about.features.library.title: Cloud Library
about.features.library.text: Save torrents to your account — movies and TV series are detected and organized automatically. Upgrade to Vault for long-term storage that keeps files available even when seeders disappear.
about.features.ai.title: AI-Powered Discover
about.features.ai.text: Describe what you want to watch in plain words and get a personalized list of films — each with a one-line reason tying it to your taste. Built on top of the Discover catalog.
about.features.discover.title: Discover Catalog
about.features.discover.text: Browse a unified catalog assembled from your Stremio addons. Search by title, filter by genre, and start streaming through Webtor with one click.
about.features.webdav.title: WebDAV Support
about.features.webdav.text: Access your library as a network folder via WebDAV from your profile. Works with Mountain Duck, RaiDrive, Owlfiles.
about.features.chrome.title: Chrome Extension
about.features.chrome.text: Install the extension and every torrent or magnet link you click opens automatically in Webtor.
about.features.sdk.title: Developer SDK
about.features.sdk.text: Embed the torrent streaming player on your own site with our open-source JavaScript SDK.
about.faq.title: Common questions
about.faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the things people ask most.
about.faq.free.a: Yes, Webtor.io is completely free for basic use. You can stream and download torrents without creating an account. Optional paid plans remove ads, increase bandwidth, and unlock Vault cloud storage.
about.faq.vpn.q: Do I need a VPN to use Webtor.io? Will my ISP see what I download?
about.faq.vpn.a: No VPN required. All traffic between you and Webtor.io travels over HTTPS. Your IP address is never exposed to the BitTorrent network because Webtor.io servers handle all peer communication. For your ISP, using Webtor.io looks no different from visiting any other website.
about.faq.mobile.q: Can I use Webtor.io on a phone or tablet?
about.faq.mobile.a: Yes. Webtor.io works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can stream video, listen to audio, and download torrents without installing any additional apps.
about.faq.formats.q: What video and audio formats does Webtor.io support?
about.faq.formats.a: Webtor.io supports instant streaming for most popular formats. Video: AVI, MKV, MP4, WEBM, M4V, TS, VOB. Audio: MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, M4A. Files that require transcoding may take a moment longer to start playing.
about.faq.opensource.a: Yes, 100%. All components of Webtor.io are distributed under the MIT license. You can visit the GitHub repository to view the source code and contribute.
about.faq.smarttv.q: Can I watch my library on a smart TV?
about.faq.smarttv.a: Yes! With the Stremio integration you can stream your personal library on any smart TV or device running Stremio. Just install the addon using the link from your profile.
about.faq.aiDiscover.q: What is Discover and how do the AI recommendations work?
about.faq.aiDiscover.a: Discover is a recommendations page powered by AI. Open it from the main navigation, type what you want to watch (or tap one of the suggested chips), and Webtor returns a personalized list of films — each with a short reason explaining why it fits your taste and what you've watched before. Click any card to start streaming through your usual addons.
about.faq.aiQuota.q: Is AI Discover free? How many requests do I get?
about.faq.aiQuota.a: Yes — every account gets {{.FreeQuota}} free AI request(s) per day. Supporters of the project get {{.PaidQuota}} requests per day. Suggestion chips and the rest of the Discover catalog are unlimited; only the natural-language search counts against the daily quota.
about.faq.aiModel.q: What AI model powers the recommendations? Is my data safe?
about.faq.aiModel.a: Recommendations are generated by Anthropic's Claude — a fast model for the free tier and a more capable one for supporters. We send the model only your title/year/rating history. No email, IP address, or any other personal data is shared. The response is used purely to suggest films you can stream through your usual addons.
about.faq.expire.q: Do download links or streams expire?
about.faq.expire.a: Yes, for security reasons direct download links and streaming sessions are temporary and may expire after a short time. You can always refresh or regenerate them from your library interface.
about.faq.ads.q: How can I remove ads on Webtor.io?
about.faq.ads.a: Support the project and you'll get an ad-free experience, faster loading speeds, and a heart icon in the interface.
about.faq.zip.q: Why do some downloaded ZIP archives show a CRC error?
about.faq.zip.a: ZIP archives are generated on-the-fly and don't include full checksum data. Some extraction tools may show a warning even when the file is fully intact. We recommend using 7-Zip for best compatibility.
about.faq.speed.q: Why is my download or streaming speed slow on Webtor.io?
about.faq.speed.a1: Speeds may vary due to the number of seeders, file format (some require real-time transcoding), your internet connection, current server load, and your account type. Premium users get higher bandwidth.
about.faq.speed.a2: Note: bandwidth is measured in Mbps (megabits per second), while file sizes are shown in MB (megabytes). 1 MB = 8 Mb, so a 50 Mbps connection gives roughly 6.25 MB/s download speed. Supporting the project helps unlock better speed and reliability.
about.cta.title: Ready to try?
about.cta.subtitle: No signup needed. Paste a magnet link and start streaming in seconds.

tool.torrentToDdl.title: Torrent → DDL
tool.torrentToDdl.benefit: Convert Torrent to Direct Download Link
tool.torrentToDdl.description: Convert torrents to direct download links in your browser. Download files from torrents with cloud-based processing and no local client required.
tool.torrentToZip.title: Torrent → ZIP
tool.torrentToZip.benefit: Download Torrent Files as ZIP Archive
tool.torrentToZip.description: Download torrent files as a ZIP archive directly in your browser. Cloud-based torrent to ZIP conversion for fast and reliable access.
tool.magnetToDdl.title: Magnet → DDL
tool.magnetToDdl.benefit: Convert Magnet Link to Direct Download Link
tool.magnetToDdl.description: Convert magnet links to direct download links online. Process magnet links in your browser using secure cloud-based torrent handling.
tool.magnetToTorrent.title: Magnet → Torrent
tool.magnetToTorrent.description: Convert magnet links to .torrent files in your browser. Generate torrent files online with cloud-based processing.
tool.torrentToStream.title: Torrent → Stream
tool.torrentToStream.benefit: Convert Any Torrent to HLS Stream
tool.torrentToStream.description: Convert torrent files to HLS video streams on the fly. Cloud-based real-time torrent to stream transcoding for smooth playback on any device.
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.title: Watch Torrents Online
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.description: Stream torrent videos directly in your browser without installing software. Web-based torrent streaming with cloud processing.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.title: Watch Torrents on iOS
tool.watchTorrentsIos.benefit: Stream Torrent to on iPhone / iPad – No Apps Needed
tool.watchTorrentsIos.description: Stream torrents on iPhone and iPad directly in your browser. No apps required. Web-based torrent streaming for iOS with cloud processing.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.title: Online Torrent Downloader
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.benefit: Download Torrents Online – No Torrent Client Needed
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.description: Download torrent files and magnet links directly in your browser. No torrent client required. Web-based torrent downloading with server-side processing.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.title: Stream Torrent Online
tool.streamTorrentOnline.benefit: Stream Any Torrent Directly in Your Browser
tool.streamTorrentOnline.description: Stream torrent files and magnet links directly in your browser without downloading. Instant cloud-based torrent streaming with HLS transcoding for any video format.
tool.torrentPlayer.title: Online Torrent Player
tool.torrentPlayer.benefit: Play Any Torrent Video in Your Browser
tool.torrentPlayer.description: Free online torrent player that plays video files from torrents directly in the browser. Supports MKV, AVI, MP4, WEBM and more with real-time transcoding.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.steps.title: How to download torrents with Webtor.io
tool.torrentToDdl.about.steps.subtitle: Convert your torrent file or magnet link into a direct download link in 3 simple steps — no torrent client needed.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.steps.step1.text: Find the .torrent file on your computer or copy a magnet link from any source.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.steps.step2.text: Drop the file into the upload area or paste the magnet link, then click Search.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.steps.step3.text: Browse the file list and click any file to get a direct HTTP download link.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.explained.title: What is torrent to DDL and how does it work?
tool.torrentToDdl.about.explained.p1: Torrent to DDL is a method of converting a torrent file into a direct download link (DDL) that works over standard HTTP or HTTPS. Instead of connecting to peers through a torrent client, the torrent is processed on a server and the files become available as regular downloadable links.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.explained.p2: This approach removes the need to install torrent software and makes downloading or streaming files easier on any device, including mobile phones and tablets.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.compare.title: Torrent vs DDL: what's the difference?
tool.torrentToDdl.about.compare.subtitle: Torrents and direct download links both deliver files, but they use very different technologies.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.compare.footer: Torrent to DDL is often preferred when you want simplicity, stability, and quick access to files without dealing with torrent clients.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.safety.title: Is torrent to DDL safe? Do I need a VPN?
tool.torrentToDdl.about.safety.text: Torrent to DDL is generally safer than using a traditional torrent client because you do not connect directly to the torrent swarm. Your IP address is not exposed to other peers in the same way. All traffic between you and Webtor.io travels over HTTPS, so no VPN is required.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.video.title: Why torrent to DDL is better for video files
tool.torrentToDdl.about.video.subtitle: Video torrents are often inconvenient with classic torrent clients: you may need to wait for enough pieces to download before playback works smoothly. With torrent to DDL, video files can be streamed over HTTP, so you can start watching instantly without downloading the entire file first.
tool.torrentToDdl.about.video.footer: If your torrent contains video content, streaming is usually faster and more convenient than downloading everything upfront.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.title: How to download magnets with Webtor.io
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.subtitle: Convert your magnet link into a direct download link in 3 simple steps — no torrent client needed.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step1.title: Copy your magnet link
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step1.text: Copy the magnet URL from any website or torrent index.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step2.title: Paste & search
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step2.text: Paste the magnet link into the text field and click the Search button.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step3.title: Click to download
tool.magnetToDdl.about.steps.step3.text: Browse the file list and click any file to get a direct HTTP download link.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.explained.title: What is magnet to DDL and how does it work?
tool.magnetToDdl.about.explained.p1: Magnet to DDL is a method of converting a magnet link into a direct download link (DDL) that works over standard HTTP or HTTPS. A magnet link does not contain the full torrent file — it points to torrent metadata that must be fetched first. With Webtor.io, the metadata is resolved on a server and the files become available as regular downloadable links.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.explained.p2: This approach removes the need to install torrent software and makes downloading or streaming files easier on any device, including mobile phones and tablets.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.compare.title: Magnet vs torrent file: what's the difference?
tool.magnetToDdl.about.compare.subtitle: A torrent file contains metadata about the content and trackers. A magnet link is a shorter format that references the same content by its hash.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.compare.footer: If you only have a magnet link, converting magnet to DDL is the simplest way to download files in a browser without installing a torrent client.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.safety.title: Is magnet to DDL safe? Do I need a VPN?
tool.magnetToDdl.about.safety.text: Magnet to DDL is generally safer than using a traditional torrent client because you do not connect directly to the torrent swarm from your device. Your IP address is not exposed to other peers in the same way as with peer-to-peer downloading. All traffic between you and Webtor.io travels over HTTPS, so no VPN is required.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.video.title: Why magnet to DDL is better for video files
tool.magnetToDdl.about.video.subtitle: Video torrents are often inconvenient with classic torrent clients: you may need to wait for enough pieces to download before playback works smoothly. With magnet to DDL, video files can be streamed over HTTP, so you can start watching instantly without downloading the entire file first.
tool.magnetToDdl.about.video.footer: If your magnet link points to video content, streaming is usually faster and more convenient than downloading everything upfront.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.steps.title: How to convert magnets to torrents with Webtor.io
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.steps.subtitl: Convert your magnet link into a .torrent file in 3 simple steps — no torrent client needed.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.steps.step1.t: Copy the magnet URL from any website or torrent index.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.steps.step2.t: Paste the magnet link into the text field and click the Search button.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.steps.step3.t: Scroll down and click Download Torrent File to save the .torrent to your device.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.explained.tit: What is magnet to torrent and how does it work?
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.explained.p1: Magnet to torrent is a method of converting a magnet link into a standard .torrent file. A magnet link contains only a hash and a set of parameters, while a torrent file includes full metadata such as file lists, sizes, and trackers.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.explained.p2: When you convert a magnet link with Webtor.io, the torrent metadata is resolved on a server and packaged into a downloadable torrent file that you can save and reuse later.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.compare.title: Magnet link vs torrent file: what's the difference?
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.compare.subti: Magnet links and torrent files point to the same content, but they work differently and are used in different scenarios.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.compare.magne: Contains only a hash and parameters
Easy to share as a short link
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.compare.torre: Can be saved and reused offline
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.compare.foote: Converting magnet to torrent is useful when you want a permanent file that can be reused, shared, or added to a torrent client later.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.useCases.titl: When should you convert magnet to torrent?
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.useCases.subt: Converting magnet links to torrent files is useful in several common scenarios.
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.useCases.item: Sharing with clients that require .torrent files
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.safety.title: Is magnet to torrent safe? Do I need a VPN?
tool.magnetToTorrent.about.safety.text: Converting a magnet link to a torrent file does not require connecting to the torrent swarm from your device. The metadata resolution happens on the server side, which makes the process simpler and safer for the user. All traffic travels over HTTPS, so no VPN is required.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.about.steps: How to download torrents with Webtor.io
Convert your torrent file or magnet link into a direct download link in 3 simple steps — no torrent client needed.
Find the .torrent file on your computer or copy a magnet link from any source.
Drop the file into the upload area or paste the magnet link, then click Search.
Browse the file list and click any file to get a direct HTTP download link.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.about.expla: What is an online torrent downloader?

An online torrent downloader is a service that handles torrent connections on a remote server and delivers files to you over standard HTTP or HTTPS. Your device does not join the torrent swarm directly.
This means you can download torrent content using only a web browser, without running background processes or installing special software.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.about.compa: Online torrent downloader vs torrent client
Downloading torrents online works differently from using a traditional torrent client.
An online torrent downloader is usually preferred when you want simplicity, quick access, and minimal setup.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.about.useCa: When is an online torrent downloader useful?
Downloading torrents online is especially useful in situations where installing or running a torrent client is inconvenient or impossible.
tool.onlineTorrentDownloader.about.safet: With an online torrent downloader, you can either download files or stream video content directly in your browser.

Streaming is often more convenient for video torrents, while downloading is better when you need to keep the files for offline use. Either way, your device does not connect directly to the torrent swarm — Webtor.io handles everything on the server side over HTTPS.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.steps.tit: How to stream torrents online with Webtor.io
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.steps.sub: Stream any torrent video directly in your browser in 3 simple steps — no software to install, no files to download.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.steps.ste: Upload a .torrent file or paste a magnet link into the search field on Webtor.io.
Webtor fetches the torrent data and transcodes video to HLS in real time on the server side.
The video starts playing instantly in your browser — no download, no waiting.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.explained: Streaming a torrent online means watching video content from a torrent without downloading the entire file to your device first. The torrent data is fetched by a cloud server and converted into an HLS video stream that plays natively in any modern web browser.

Webtor.io handles all the heavy lifting — BitTorrent connections, real-time transcoding with FFmpeg, and HLS segment delivery — so you get smooth playback regardless of the original video format (MKV, AVI, MP4, WEBM, and more).
Why stream torrents online instead of downloading?
Traditional torrent downloads require a client, take up disk space, and make you wait. Streaming torrents online with Webtor eliminates all of that — playback starts in seconds.
Instant playback — no waiting for full download
Supports MKV, AVI, MP4, WEBM, and more
No torrent client or software to install
Real-time HLS transcoding on the server
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.safety.ti: Is it safe to stream torrents online?
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.safety.te: When you stream torrents online with Webtor.io, your device never connects to the torrent swarm directly. All data is fetched by Webtor servers and delivered to your browser over encrypted HTTPS. No VPN is needed, no ports to open, and no peer-to-peer traffic touches your network.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.devices.t: Stream torrents online on any device
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.devices.s: Because Webtor streams via HLS over standard HTTPS, it works in any modern browser on any operating system — desktop or mobile, no extra apps required.
tool.streamTorrentOnline.about.devices.i: iPhones and iPads via Safari or Chrome
tool.torrentPlayer.about.steps.title: How to play torrent videos online with Webtor.io
tool.torrentPlayer.about.steps.subtitle: Play any video from a torrent directly in your browser in 3 simple steps — no desktop player or torrent client needed.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.steps.step1.tex: Upload a .torrent file or paste a magnet link into the Webtor.io search field.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.steps.step2.tex: Browse the torrent contents and click on any video file to open the built-in player.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.steps.step3.tex: Enjoy playback with seek, subtitles, and fullscreen — just like a native video player.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.explained.title: What is an online torrent player?
tool.torrentPlayer.about.explained.p1: An online torrent player is a web-based video player that can open and play video files from torrents directly in your browser. Unlike desktop media players such as VLC or MPC, there is nothing to install — the player runs entirely in the browser.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.explained.p2: Webtor.io transcodes video on the server in real time using FFmpeg, converting formats like MKV, AVI, MP4, WEBM, MOV, and WMV into browser-compatible HLS streams. This means virtually any video format plays smoothly without codec packs or plugins.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.benefits.title: Why use an online torrent player?
tool.torrentPlayer.about.benefits.subtit: Desktop players require downloading the whole file first and installing codec packs. Webtor's online torrent player handles everything in the cloud so you can focus on watching.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.benefits.item1: Plays MKV, AVI, MP4, WEBM, MOV, WMV
tool.torrentPlayer.about.benefits.item3: Seek anywhere in the video instantly
tool.torrentPlayer.about.benefits.item4: No codec packs, plugins, or installs
tool.torrentPlayer.about.safety.title: Is the online torrent player safe to use?
tool.torrentPlayer.about.safety.text: The Webtor torrent player runs in your browser and never exposes your device to the torrent swarm. All torrent connections are handled server-side, and video is delivered to you over encrypted HTTPS. No VPN is required, and no data is stored on your device beyond the browser cache.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.devices.title: Play torrent videos on any device
tool.torrentPlayer.about.devices.subtitl: Unlike desktop players that only run on specific operating systems, Webtor's online torrent player works in any modern browser on any device.
tool.torrentPlayer.about.devices.item3: iPhones and iPads via Safari or Chrome
tool.torrentToStream.about.steps.title: How to convert a torrent to an HLS stream with Webtor.io
tool.torrentToStream.about.steps.subtitl: Turn any torrent into a streamable HLS video in 3 simple steps — real-time cloud transcoding, no download required.
tool.torrentToStream.about.steps.step1.t: Upload a .torrent file or paste a magnet link into Webtor.io.
tool.torrentToStream.about.steps.step2.t: Webtor fetches the torrent data and transcodes video to HLS segments in real time.
tool.torrentToStream.about.steps.step3.t: Watch in the browser, open in Stremio, or use the developer API to embed the stream.
tool.torrentToStream.about.explained.p1: Torrent to stream is the process of converting torrent video content into an HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) or DASH video stream on the fly. Instead of downloading the entire file, the video is segmented and delivered in small chunks that play sequentially in any compatible player.
tool.torrentToStream.about.explained.p2: Webtor.io performs this conversion in the cloud using FFmpeg-based real-time transcoding. The result is an HLS stream delivered in small segments, enabling instant playback without waiting for the full file to download.
tool.torrentToStream.about.benefits.subt: Raw torrent files are not streamable — they require a BitTorrent client and full download. Converting to HLS unlocks instant playback, device compatibility, and integration possibilities.
tool.torrentToStream.about.benefits.item: Real-time HLS transcoding for instant playback
Works with Stremio and other HLS players
tool.torrentToStream.about.safety.title: Is torrent to stream conversion safe?
tool.torrentToStream.about.safety.text: With Webtor.io, all torrent-to-stream conversion happens on the server. Your device never connects to the torrent swarm, and the resulting HLS stream is delivered over encrypted HTTPS. No VPN is needed, no ports to configure, and no peer-to-peer traffic reaches your network.
tool.torrentToStream.about.devices.title: Stream converted torrents on any device
tool.torrentToStream.about.devices.subti: HLS is the most widely supported streaming format. Once a torrent is converted, the stream plays on virtually any device with a browser or media player.
tool.torrentToZip.about.steps.title: How to download torrents as ZIP with Webtor.io
tool.torrentToZip.about.steps.subtitle: Download the content of your torrent as a ZIP archive in 3 simple steps — no torrent client needed.
tool.torrentToZip.about.steps.step1.text: Find the .torrent file on your computer or copy a magnet link.
tool.torrentToZip.about.steps.step2.text: Drop the file into the upload area or paste the magnet link, then click Search.
tool.torrentToZip.about.steps.step3.text: Scroll down and click Download Directory As ZIP to grab everything in one archive.
tool.torrentToZip.about.explained.title: What is torrent to ZIP and how does it work?
tool.torrentToZip.about.explained.p1: Torrent to ZIP is a way to convert the contents of a torrent into a single ZIP archive. Instead of downloading many separate files through a torrent client, all files are packed into one archive and delivered over standard HTTP.
tool.torrentToZip.about.explained.p2: This makes torrent downloads easier to manage, especially when a torrent contains many small files or complex folder structures.
tool.torrentToZip.about.benefits.title: Why download a torrent as a ZIP archive?
tool.torrentToZip.about.benefits.subtitl: Downloading a torrent as a ZIP archive is often more convenient than grabbing individual files or using a torrent client. A single ZIP file is easier to download, store, and transfer between devices.
tool.torrentToZip.about.benefits.item1: One download instead of many separate files
tool.torrentToZip.about.compare.title: ZIP download vs individual file downloads
tool.torrentToZip.about.compare.subtitle: Both methods deliver the same torrent content, but they suit different situations.
tool.torrentToZip.about.compare.individu: Pick only the files you need
tool.torrentToZip.about.safety.title: When is torrent to ZIP the best option?
tool.torrentToZip.about.safety.p1: Torrent to ZIP is the best choice when convenience matters more than speed or selective downloads. It works especially well for torrents with many small files, software distributions or datasets, downloads on phones and tablets, and cases where you need one clean archive.
tool.torrentToZip.about.safety.p2: Your device does not connect directly to the torrent swarm — Webtor.io handles everything on the server side and delivers the ZIP over HTTPS.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.steps.title: How to watch torrents on iPhone or iPad
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.steps.subtit: Stream torrent videos on iOS in 3 simple steps — no apps required.
Open Webtor.io in Safari on your iPhone or iPad.
Paste a magnet link or upload a torrent file from your device.
Click play and enjoy the video instantly — no download needed.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.explained.ti: Why torrents are hard to use on iOS
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.explained.p1: iOS restricts background processes, file access, and peer-to-peer networking, which makes classic torrent clients impractical or unavailable on iPhones and iPads. Downloading large files is also inconvenient due to storage and system limitations.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.explained.p2: As a result, many torrent apps for iOS are limited, unreliable, or require complex workarounds.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.explained.p3: Instead of downloading torrent data directly on your device, Webtor.io handles torrent connections and buffering on the server side. Video files are streamed over standard HTTP, which works smoothly in Safari on iOS.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.benefits.tit: Why streaming torrents on iOS is better than downloading
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.benefits.sub: Streaming torrent videos on iOS is often faster and more convenient than downloading files. It avoids storage limits and lets you start watching immediately.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.benefits.ite: No large files stored on your device
Instant playback for movies and TV shows
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.formats.titl: What video formats work on iOS?
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.formats.subt: Webtor transcodes video on the fly, so most common torrent video formats play directly in Safari on iOS.
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.formats.item: No codec packs or extra apps needed
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.safety.title: Is it safe to watch torrents on iOS?
tool.watchTorrentsIos.about.safety.text: When you stream torrents on iOS with Webtor.io, your iPhone or iPad does not connect directly to the torrent swarm. Torrent data is processed on the server side and delivered as a video stream over HTTPS. All you need is Safari and a magnet link or torrent file.
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.steps.tit: How to watch torrents online with Webtor.io
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.steps.sub: Stream torrent content online in 3 simple steps — no downloads or torrent client needed.
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.steps.ste: Upload a torrent file or paste a magnet link into the search field.
Webtor prepares the video stream on the server side — usually just a few seconds.
Click play and enjoy the video instantly in your browser — no download needed.
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.explained: Watching torrents online means streaming video files directly from a torrent without downloading the entire file to your device. Instead of waiting for a full download, playback starts as soon as enough data is available.
Webtor.io handles torrent connections and buffering on the server side, so you can watch video torrents using a regular web browser on desktop or mobile devices.
Why watch torrents online instead of downloading?
Downloading a full torrent file can take time and requires storage space. Streaming torrents online is often faster and more convenient, especially for video content.
Works on mobile devices and tablets
No need to manage downloaded files
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.safety.ti: Is it safe to watch torrents online?
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.safety.te: When you watch torrents online with Webtor.io, your device does not connect directly to the torrent swarm. Torrent data is fetched and streamed through Webtor servers over HTTPS, reducing complexity compared to traditional torrent clients.
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.devices.t: Watch torrents online on any device
tool.watchTorrentsOnline.about.devices.s: Because Webtor works in a web browser, you can watch torrent videos online on Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS devices without installing additional apps.
instructions.paidOnly: This feature is available only for paid users.
instructions.stremio.title: Stremio Integration
instructions.stremio.heading: How to connect Webtor to Stremio
instructions.stremio.intro: You can stream your personal torrent library from Webtor directly in Stremio. Here's how to do it:
instructions.stremio.step1: Copy your personal addon link from your Webtor profile.
instructions.stremio.step2: Open Stremio and go to the Add-ons section.
instructions.stremio.step3: Click the Add Addon button in the top-right corner.
instructions.stremio.step4: Paste the addon link and press Enter. Done!
instructions.stremio.result: Once installed, your library will appear in Stremio under the Webtor.io addon – ready to stream.
instructions.stremio.noteWarmup: Streaming via Webtor may differ from regular Stremio addons. It can take some time to warm up the torrent before playback starts.
instructions.stremioAddon.title: How to connect Stremio Addon
instructions.stremioAddon.heading: How to connect Stremio Addon
instructions.stremioAddon.intro: Want to add more content to your Stremio experience? Follow these simple steps to connect external Stremio addons to expand your streaming library:
instructions.stremioAddon.step1: Go to stremio-addons.com
instructions.stremioAddon.step2: Browse and select the addon you want to install
instructions.stremioAddon.step3: Copy the addon's manifest URL with the "Copy link" button
instructions.stremioAddon.step4: Paste the URL in the "Stremio Addons" section at your profile page and click "Add Addon"
instructions.stremioAddon.result: Once added, the addon content will be available through your Stremio integration, expanding your streaming options with additional sources and catalogs.
instructions.stremioAddon.noteGathering: Gathering streaming URLs can take some time (up to 10 seconds). Be patient.
instructions.webdav.title: WebDAV Integration
instructions.webdav.heading: How to connect Webtor via WebDAV
instructions.webdav.intro: Access your torrent library just like a regular folder. With WebDAV, you can browse, stream, and manage your files directly from your favorite apps.
instructions.webdav.step1: Copy your personal WebDAV URL from your Webtor profile.
instructions.webdav.step2: Install a WebDAV client on your device (see recommendations below).
instructions.webdav.step3: Connect using your WebDAV URL and start browsing your library.
instructions.webdav.clientWindows: Windows: RaiDrive (free for personal use) / Mountain Duck
instructions.webdav.clientMobile: Mobile: Owlfiles iOS / Android
instructions.webdav.clientAdvanced: Advanced: rclone CLI tool with VFS caching support
instructions.webdav.notePaid: WebDAV access is only available for paid users.
instructions.vault.title: Vault
instructions.vault.intro: Vault is a storage system in Webtor that allows you to:
instructions.vault.feature1: save torrents for a long time,
instructions.vault.feature2: watch content without waiting for seeders,
instructions.vault.vpSource: Points are provided as part of your subscription or other activities (the amount depends on your subscription tier)
instructions.vault.howStep1: Click the "Keep This Torrent Available" button next to the torrent you want to save.
instructions.vault.howStep2: Confirm the number of points required (for example, if the torrent is 10 GB, you need to deposit 10 VP).
instructions.vault.howStep3: The funded points are frozen for {{.FreezePeriod}} after the pledge is created.
instructions.vault.howStep4: Webtor transfers the torrent to the Vault (if the transfer fails within {{.TransferTimeout}}, VP is returned).
instructions.vault.claimItem1: Points can be claimed back if they are not frozen.
instructions.vault.claimItem2: If after claiming points back the amount is less than required to keep the torrent, it will be marked as expired and deleted after {{.ExpirePeriod}}.
instructions.vault.claimItem3: When a torrent is deleted, all pledges associated with it are also deleted.
instructions.vault.expireItem1: Points that were invested in torrents lose their power and the torrent is marked as expired and deleted after {{.ExpirePeriod}}.
instructions.vault.expireItem2: If the subscription is renewed, the points become active again and the torrents funded by them are no longer expired.
instructions.vault.disclaimer: If a torrent is blocked by copyright holders or removed from public sources, it may disappear – Vault does not guarantee preservation in such cases.
aboutPage.title: About — Mission & Open Source
aboutPage.description: Webtor is an open-source, browser-based torrent platform. Learn about our mission to make torrents accessible, private, and easy to use — no installs required.
aboutPage.heading: About Webtor
aboutPage.intro: Webtor is a free, open-source platform that lets you stream and download torrents directly in the browser — no software to install, no configuration needed.
aboutPage.missionP1: Torrents are a powerful, decentralized way to share files — but using them has always required dedicated software, technical knowledge, and patience. We built Webtor to change that.
aboutPage.missionP2: Our goal is to make torrents accessible to everyone. Whether you want to stream a video, preview files before downloading, or just grab a single file from a torrent — you can do it all in your browser, on any device.
aboutPage.missionP3: Webtor processes everything in the cloud, so your device stays light and your IP stays private. No sign-up required — just paste a magnet link or upload a .torrent file and go.
aboutPage.osP1: Webtor is fully open-source under the MIT License. Every component — from the backend services to this web interface — is publicly available on GitHub.
aboutPage.osP2: We believe that transparency builds trust. You can inspect the code, report issues, suggest features, or contribute directly.
